title: macropsychanthus coriaceus
intro: Macropsychanthus coriaceus, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is a tree native to New Caledonia. The medicinal properties of Macropsychanthus coriaceus include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Macropsychanthus coriaceus include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
